style.base_prompt: production-ready isometric pixel art for a rogue-like multiplayer RTS, matte finish, clean readable silhouette at StarCraft 2 camera distance, transparent background where appropriate, no UI, no text, no watermark. Kon faction has two linked themes: Observer theme is cyan glow, silver, glass, bone-white glyphs and controlled observation equipment; Evolution theme is dark moss green biomass, wet bark, roots, pulsing blood-red sacs, vampire mushroom growths. Keep consistent camera angle and footprint for sprite sheets and RTS buildings.
style.negative_prompt: photorealistic, blurry, painterly smear, text, logo, watermark, messy crop, cut off silhouette, inconsistent camera angle, plastic shine, modern guns, large UI panels, random sci-fi metal unless specifically described

animations.name: melee_attack
animations.action_description: forceful melee attack with claws, staff, roots, or body lunge

animations.name: ranged_attack
animations.action_description: ranged spore or broken staff attack with clear recoil and muzzle/spore flash

animations.name: cast
animations.action_description: spell cast animation, readable windup and release, observer cyan or evolution red green depending on unit

animations.name: evolve
animations.action_description: unit mutates and hardens with pulsing biomass, red sacs, cyan sparks

animations.name: death
animations.action_description: collapse into roots, spores, and dissolving biomass

assets.description: Bad Kon Willow, miserable hooded life wizard, broken staff split into two casting foci, cyan glowing eyes and hand, observer cult robes, silver glyph tags, small red mushrooms growing through cloak
Terrible Thing base form, cheap hunched biomass unit, mixed melee claws and short ranged spit sac, roots, bone hooks, vampire mushroom caps, readable as basic swarm unit
Terrible Thing evolved frontline tank dedication, armored bark plates, swollen red sacs, broad stance, shield-like fungal growths, still recognizably evolved from base form
Terrible Thing evolved backline ranged dedication, long spore barrel organ, thinner legs, cyan spore vents, roots stabilizing like a living tripod
Horror, fast ranged vampire mushroom predator, lean sinewy root legs, spore launcher organ, cyan vents, red fungal eyes, speed-focused silhouette
Apex healer form, medium-large support horror, maw and tendrils that consume allied biomass, bone crown, healing sacs, ominous but not fully monstrous yet
Apex evolved predator form, very powerful melee monster, massive tendril maw, bone crown, dark green hide, pulsing red evolution sacs, elite readable silhouette
The Observation Tower HQ, large observer cult tower with glass dome roof, cyan telescope lenses, silver/bone supports, Kon can garrison inside to observe and build his base, 4x4 RTS footprint
Bio Absorber economy building, large sentient organic drill tunneling into the ground, dark green biomass, pulsing red sacs, cyan healing vents, 2x2 footprint
Barracks, a horrible living lab of biomass where observer architecture is overrun by evolution, broken glass, silver lab frame, red roots and growth sacs, 3x3 footprint
Terrible Vault armory, sealed observer research vault for upgrading units, cyan containment cracks, silver glyph locks, dark vines forcing it open, 3x3 footprint
Vinewall single grid segment, regenerating retaliating thorn wall, starts wounded at half health, dark bark, red sacs, teeth-like thorns, 1x1 footprint
Bio Launcher rooted long range defense, static organic artillery plant, bone barrel, red sacs, green roots anchored into ground, clear attack direction, 2x2 footprint
Bio Launcher uprooted mobile mode, same living artillery walking on roots with barrel lowered, readable moveable defense, 2x2 footprint
